translations.vi: Tôi vẫn là người mới học.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula), 1st person singular present, linking the subject to the predicate noun.
Temporal/degree adverb meaning 'still', modifying the copular predicate.
Common noun, feminine singular; predicate nominative naming the subject's role/status.

sentences.target: Sie ist die neue Lernerin im Kurs.
sentences.reading: /ziː ɪst diː ˈnɔʏ̯ə ˈlɛʁnəʁɪn ɪm kʊʁs/

translations.de: Sie ist die neue Lernerin im Kurs.
translations.ipa: /ziː ɪst diː ˈnɔʏ̯ə ˈlɛʁnəʁɪn ɪm kʊʁs/
translations.en: She is the new learner in the course.
translations.es: Ella es la nueva alumna del curso.
translations.fr: C'est la nouvelle élève du cours.
translations.it: È la nuova studentessa del corso.
translations.yue: 佢係呢個課程嘅新學員。
translations.pt: Ela é a nova aluna do curso.
translations.vi: Cô ấy là học viên mới của khóa học.
translations.nl: Zij is de nieuwe cursist in de cursus.
translations.hu: Ő az új tanuló a kurzuson.
translations.hi: वह कोर्स में नई छात्रा है.
translations.el: Είναι η νέα μαθήτρια στο μάθημα.
translations.nb: Hun er den nye deltakeren på kurset.
translations.id: Dia adalah peserta baru di kursus.
translations.sv: Hon är den nya deltagaren på kursen.
translations.ro: Ea este noua cursantă la curs.
translations.da: Hun er den nye deltager på kurset.
translations.ja: 彼女はその講座の新しい受講生です。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular personal pronoun (feminine) in nominative case; subject.
Finite auxiliary (copula), 3rd person singular present.
Definite article, feminine singular nominative, determiner of 'Lernerin'.
Attributive adjective, inflected to agree with feminine singular nominative noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; predicate nominal complement of 'ist'.
Contracted preposition ('in dem'); introduces a prepositional phrase and governs dative case.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'im' (dative singular).

sentences.target: Unsere Lernerin braucht heute eine Pause.

translations.de: Unsere Lernerin braucht heute eine Pause.
translations.en: Our learner needs a break today.
translations.es: Nuestra alumna necesita un descanso hoy.
translations.fr: Notre élève a besoin d'une pause aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La nostra studentessa oggi ha bisogno di una pausa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的学员今天需要休息一下。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅學員今日要休息下。
translations.pt: Nossa aluna precisa de uma pausa hoje.
translations.tr: Öğrencimiz bugün bir molaya ihtiyaç duyuyor.
translations.vi: Học viên của chúng tôi hôm nay cần nghỉ ngơi.
translations.nl: Onze cursist heeft vandaag een pauze nodig.
translations.hu: A tanulónknak ma szünetre van szüksége.
translations.hi: हमारी छात्रा को आज आराम की ज़रूरत है.
translations.el: Η μαθήτριά μας σήμερα χρειάζεται ένα διάλειμμα.
translations.nb: Vår deltaker trenger en pause i dag.
translations.id: Peserta kami perlu istirahat hari ini.
translations.sv: Vår deltagare behöver en paus i dag.
translations.ro: Cursanta noastră are nevoie de uma pauză astăzi.
translations.da: Vores deltager har brug for en pause i dag.
translations.ja: 私たちの受講生は今日は休憩が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular nominative; modifies 'Lernerin'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes an accusative object.
Temporal adverb indicating the time reference.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Pause'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'braucht'.

sentences.target: Als Lernerin übe ich jeden Abend.

translations.de: Als Lernerin übe ich jeden Abend.
translations.en: As a learner, I practice every evening.
translations.es: Como alumna, practico todas las noches.
translations.fr: En tant qu'élève, je m'exerce tous les soirs.
translations.it: Da principiante, mi esercito ogni sera.
translations.zh-Hans: 作为学习者，我每天晚上都练习。
translations.yue: 作為學習者，我每晚都會練習。
translations.ru: Как участница, я занимаюсь каждый вечер.
translations.pt: Como aluna, pratico todas as noites.
translations.tr: Bir öğrenci olarak her akşam pratik yapıyorum.
translations.vi: Là người học, tôi luyện tập mỗi tối.
translations.nl: Als cursist oefen ik elke avond.
translations.hi: एक छात्रा के रूप में मैं हर शाम अभ्यास करती हूँ.
translations.nb: Som deltaker øver jeg hver kveld.
translations.id: Sebagai peserta, saya berlatih setiap malam.
translations.sv: Som deltagare övar jag varje kväll.
translations.ro: Ca cursantă, exersez în fiecare seară.
translations.da: Som deltager øver jeg hver aften.
translations.ja: 学習者として、私は毎晩練習します。

tokens.explanation: Preposition meaning 'as, in the role of'; introduces a role phrase.
Common noun within the 'als'-phrase; denotes the role/capacity.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; verb in V2 position.
1st person singular personal pronoun, nominative; subject placed after the verb due to V2 word order.
Quantifying determiner, accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Abend'.
Common noun, masculine; temporal accusative ('every evening').
